name: Announcing the Agent2Agent Protocol (A2A) - Google for Developers Blog
snippet: A2A is an open protocol that complements Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP), which provides helpful tools and context to agents.

name: Google's Agent-to-Agent (A2A) and Anthropic's Model Context Protocol
snippet: Google's A2A and Anthropic's MCP are open protocols enabling AI agents to collaborate and use tools, shaping a decentralized, interoperable AI future.
